rules.context: Direct replacement: AlfaVerticalLayout maps to Vaadin 24 VerticalLayout
migrationSteps: Replace import: com.alfa.ui.AlfaVerticalLayout → com.vaadin.flow.component.orderedlayout.VerticalLayout
Replace class usage: AlfaVerticalLayout → VerticalLayout
Verify addComponent() calls are replaced with add()

rules.context: Direct replacement: AlfaHorizontalLayout maps to Vaadin 24 HorizontalLayout
migrationSteps: Replace import: com.alfa.ui.AlfaHorizontalLayout → com.vaadin.flow.component.orderedlayout.HorizontalLayout
Replace class usage: AlfaHorizontalLayout → HorizontalLayout
Verify addComponent() calls are replaced with add()

rules.context: Direct replacement: AlfaFormLayout maps to Vaadin 24 FormLayout
migrationSteps: Replace import: com.alfa.ui.AlfaFormLayout → com.vaadin.flow.component.formlayout.FormLayout
Replace class usage: AlfaFormLayout → FormLayout
Update field binding approach — Flow FormLayout uses binders differently

rules.context: AlfaGridLayout has no direct Flow equivalent — rewrite using CSS Grid or FlexLayout
migrationSteps: Identify grid column/row configuration in AlfaGridLayout usage
Replace with CSS Grid using Div with appropriate CSS classes or FlexLayout
Map addComponent(component, col, row) to positional CSS grid placement
Test visual layout equivalence after migration

rules.context: AlfaSplitPanel maps to Vaadin 24 SplitLayout
migrationSteps: Replace import: com.alfa.ui.AlfaSplitPanel → com.vaadin.flow.component.splitlayout.SplitLayout
Replace class usage: AlfaSplitPanel → SplitLayout
Update split position API: setSplitPosition() → setSplitterPosition()

rules.context: AlfaPanel wraps content; use Div with CSS styling or Card-like pattern in Flow
migrationSteps: Replace import: com.alfa.ui.AlfaPanel → com.vaadin.flow.component.html.Div
Wrap content in Div and apply CSS class for panel-like appearance
Transfer caption to a heading element (H3/H4)
Review scrolling behavior and replicate with CSS overflow

rules.context: AlfaAbsoluteLayout uses position-based layout — replicate with CSS position:absolute
migrationSteps: Identify all component positions set via AlfaAbsoluteLayout.addComponent(comp, constraints)
Replace with Div container using CSS position:relative
Apply CSS position:absolute with left/top values to each child
Test layout on various screen sizes for responsiveness

rules.context: AlfaVerticalSplitPanel maps to SplitLayout with VERTICAL orientation
migrationSteps: Replace import: com.alfa.ui.AlfaVerticalSplitPanel → com.vaadin.flow.component.splitlayout.SplitLayout
Set orientation: new SplitLayout(SplitLayout.Orientation.VERTICAL)
Migrate setFirstComponent/setSecondComponent to addToPrimary/addToSecondary

rules.context: AlfaHorizontalSplitPanel maps to SplitLayout (default horizontal orientation)
migrationSteps: Replace import: com.alfa.ui.AlfaHorizontalSplitPanel → com.vaadin.flow.component.splitlayout.SplitLayout
Replace class usage: AlfaHorizontalSplitPanel → SplitLayout
Migrate setFirstComponent/setSecondComponent to addToPrimary/addToSecondary

rules.context: AlfaCssLayout is a plain CSS container — maps directly to Div
migrationSteps: Replace import: com.alfa.ui.AlfaCssLayout → com.vaadin.flow.component.html.Div
Replace class usage: AlfaCssLayout → Div
Transfer CSS class names using addClassName()

rules.context: AlfaOrderedLayout is a deprecated ordered container; use VerticalLayout or HorizontalLayout
migrationSteps: Determine layout direction (HORIZONTAL vs VERTICAL) from AlfaOrderedLayout usage
Replace with VerticalLayout or HorizontalLayout accordingly
Update spacing and margin configuration to Flow API

rules.context: AlfaFormItem is a label+field wrapper; use FormLayout.FormItem in Vaadin 24
migrationSteps: Replace AlfaFormItem with FormLayout.addFormItem(component, label)
Verify label text is transferred correctly
Review colspan if multi-column form

rules.context: AlfaFlexLayout maps to Vaadin 24 FlexLayout
migrationSteps: Replace import: com.alfa.ui.AlfaFlexLayout → com.vaadin.flow.component.orderedlayout.FlexLayout
Replace class usage: AlfaFlexLayout → FlexLayout
Update flex properties using setFlexDirection, setAlignItems, setJustifyContentMode

rules.context: AlfaScrollPanel is a scrollable container — use Div with CSS overflow:auto
migrationSteps: Replace with Div container
Apply CSS style: getStyle().set("overflow", "auto")
Set explicit height/width to enable scrolling
Transfer content to the new Div

rules.context: AlfaMarginInfo is a margin descriptor — use CSS margin properties directly
migrationSteps: Identify where AlfaMarginInfo is applied
Replace with CSS margin using getStyle().set("margin", value)
Or use Lumo utility spacing classes via addClassName()

rules.context: AlfaWrapLayout wraps components — use FlexLayout with wrap enabled
migrationSteps: Replace with FlexLayout
Set flex wrap: setFlexWrap(FlexLayout.FlexWrap.WRAP)
Transfer child components

rules.context: AlfaSidePanel is a slide-out panel — build with Div and CSS transform/transition
migrationSteps: Replace with Div container with CSS transition for slide behavior
Implement open/close toggle using addClassName/removeClassName
Transfer panel content to the Div

rules.context: AlfaHeaderLayout maps to semantic Header element in Vaadin 24
migrationSteps: Replace import: com.alfa.ui.AlfaHeaderLayout → com.vaadin.flow.component.html.Header
Replace class usage: AlfaHeaderLayout → Header
Review CSS styling and layout inside the header

rules.context: AlfaFooterLayout maps to semantic Footer element in Vaadin 24
migrationSteps: Replace import: com.alfa.ui.AlfaFooterLayout → com.vaadin.flow.component.html.Footer
Replace class usage: AlfaFooterLayout → Footer
Review CSS styling and layout inside the footer

rules.context: AlfaResponsiveLayout provides breakpoint-based layouts — use CSS media queries in Flow
migrationSteps: Identify breakpoint configurations in AlfaResponsiveLayout
Replace with VerticalLayout or FlexLayout
Add CSS media query classes for responsive behavior
Test on all target screen sizes

rules.context: AlfaBorderLayout mimics Java Swing BorderLayout — rewrite with CSS grid areas
migrationSteps: Map North/South/East/West/Center regions to CSS grid areas
Create a Div with CSS display:grid and grid-template-areas
Place child components in named grid areas
Test layout resize behavior

rules.context: AlfaTabSheet maps to Tabs + content Div pattern in Vaadin 24
migrationSteps: Replace with Tabs component for tab headers
Create a Div for tab content area
Implement tab selection listener to swap content
Transfer each AlfaTab's caption and content to Tab + Div pair

rules.context: AlfaAccordion maps directly to Vaadin 24 Accordion
migrationSteps: Replace import: com.alfa.ui.AlfaAccordion → com.vaadin.flow.component.accordion.Accordion
Replace class usage: AlfaAccordion → Accordion
Update add() calls to use add(String summary, Component content)

rules.context: AlfaTab maps to Vaadin 24 Tab
migrationSteps: Replace import: com.alfa.ui.AlfaTab → com.vaadin.flow.component.tabs.Tab
Replace class usage: AlfaTab → Tab
Transfer label text to Tab constructor or setLabel()

rules.context: AlfaTabContent is a content container for tabs — use Div and show/hide logic
migrationSteps: Replace AlfaTabContent with Div
Implement show/hide logic tied to tab selection
Transfer content components

rules.context: AlfaAccordionPanel maps to Vaadin 24 AccordionPanel
migrationSteps: Replace import: com.alfa.ui.AlfaAccordionPanel → com.vaadin.flow.component.accordion.AccordionPanel
Replace class usage: AlfaAccordionPanel → AccordionPanel
Update content and summary setters

rules.context: AlfaWizard has no Flow equivalent — build a multi-step flow manually with Div + navigation
migrationSteps: Design a multi-step wizard using VerticalLayout with step indicator
Implement step navigation with Back/Next buttons
Each step is a Div shown/hidden based on current step index
Transfer step validation logic from AlfaWizard

rules.context: AlfaWizardStep is a wizard step container — replace with Div in custom wizard implementation
migrationSteps: Replace with Div representing a single wizard step
Ensure wizard controller shows/hides Divs based on step navigation
Transfer step validation and event handling

rules.context: AlfaButton maps directly to Vaadin 24 Button
migrationSteps: Replace import: com.alfa.ui.AlfaButton → com.vaadin.flow.component.button.Button
Replace class usage: AlfaButton → Button
Update addClickListener() — API is compatible

rules.context: AlfaLink maps to Anchor for external links or RouterLink for internal navigation
migrationSteps: Replace import: com.alfa.ui.AlfaLink → com.vaadin.flow.component.html.Anchor
Replace class usage: AlfaLink → Anchor
Set href and caption via Anchor constructor
For internal navigation, consider RouterLink instead

rules.context: AlfaMenuBar maps to Vaadin 24 MenuBar with updated API for menu items
migrationSteps: Replace import: com.alfa.ui.AlfaMenuBar → com.vaadin.flow.component.menubar.MenuBar
Replace class usage: AlfaMenuBar → MenuBar
Rebuild menu structure using addItem() and nested MenuItem.getSubMenu()
Transfer click listeners to MenuItem click handlers

rules.context: AlfaContextMenu maps to Vaadin 24 ContextMenu
migrationSteps: Replace import: com.alfa.ui.AlfaContextMenu → com.vaadin.flow.component.contextmenu.ContextMenu
Replace class usage: AlfaContextMenu → ContextMenu
Set target component via setTarget()
Transfer menu items using addItem()

rules.context: AlfaNativeButton maps to Vaadin 24 Button
migrationSteps: Replace import: com.alfa.ui.AlfaNativeButton → com.vaadin.flow.component.button.Button
Replace class usage: AlfaNativeButton → Button
Verify click listener is compatible

rules.context: AlfaMenuItem maps to Vaadin 24 MenuItem (obtained from MenuBar.addItem())
migrationSteps: Replace standalone AlfaMenuItem usage with MenuBar.addItem() return value
Transfer text, icon, click listener
For sub-menus use MenuItem.getSubMenu().addItem()

rules.context: AlfaContextMenuItem maps to ContextMenu MenuItem
migrationSteps: Replace with ContextMenu.addItem() — returns MenuItem
Transfer click listener

rules.context: AlfaToolBar is a button toolbar — use HorizontalLayout with button theme
migrationSteps: Replace with HorizontalLayout
Apply 'toolbar' CSS class or Lumo theme variant
Transfer all buttons and actions
Set padding/spacing to match toolbar appearance

rules.context: AlfaToggleButton maps to Button with pressed/toggle theme variant or Checkbox
migrationSteps: Replace import: com.alfa.ui.AlfaToggleButton → com.vaadin.flow.component.button.Button
Apply ButtonVariant.LUMO_ICON or LUMO_TERTIARY for toggle appearance
Track toggle state manually or use Checkbox with button theme

rules.context: AlfaSplitButton is a button with dropdown — use MenuBar with primary action + dropdown
migrationSteps: Replace with MenuBar styled as a split button
Add primary action as first MenuItem
Add secondary actions as sub-menu items
Apply appropriate Lumo theme variant

rules.context: AlfaTextField maps directly to Vaadin 24 TextField
migrationSteps: Replace import: com.alfa.ui.AlfaTextField → com.vaadin.flow.component.textfield.TextField
Replace class usage: AlfaTextField → TextField
Verify getValue/setValue API is compatible

rules.context: AlfaTextArea maps directly to Vaadin 24 TextArea
migrationSteps: Replace import: com.alfa.ui.AlfaTextArea → com.vaadin.flow.component.textfield.TextArea
Replace class usage: AlfaTextArea → TextArea
Update rows/cols via setMinRows/setMaxRows

rules.context: AlfaPasswordField maps directly to Vaadin 24 PasswordField
migrationSteps: Replace import: com.alfa.ui.AlfaPasswordField → com.vaadin.flow.component.textfield.PasswordField
Replace class usage: AlfaPasswordField → PasswordField
Verify reveal/hide password behavior

rules.context: AlfaEmailField maps directly to Vaadin 24 EmailField
migrationSteps: Replace import: com.alfa.ui.AlfaEmailField → com.vaadin.flow.component.textfield.EmailField
Replace class usage: AlfaEmailField → EmailField

rules.context: AlfaNumberField maps to Vaadin 24 NumberField
migrationSteps: Replace import: com.alfa.ui.AlfaNumberField → com.vaadin.flow.component.textfield.NumberField
Replace class usage: AlfaNumberField → NumberField
Update min/max/step via setMin/setMax/setStep

rules.context: AlfaIntegerField maps to Vaadin 24 IntegerField
migrationSteps: Replace import: com.alfa.ui.AlfaIntegerField → com.vaadin.flow.component.textfield.IntegerField
Replace class usage: AlfaIntegerField → IntegerField

rules.context: AlfaComboBox maps to Vaadin 24 ComboBox with DataProvider API changes
migrationSteps: Replace import: com.alfa.ui.AlfaComboBox → com.vaadin.flow.component.combobox.ComboBox
Replace class usage: AlfaComboBox → ComboBox
Replace Container-based items with DataProvider or setItems(Collection)
Update value change listeners

rules.context: AlfaSelect maps to Vaadin 24 Select
migrationSteps: Replace import: com.alfa.ui.AlfaSelect → com.vaadin.flow.component.select.Select
Replace class usage: AlfaSelect → Select
Update items via setItems()

rules.context: AlfaCheckBox maps to Vaadin 24 Checkbox
migrationSteps: Replace import: com.alfa.ui.AlfaCheckBox → com.vaadin.flow.component.checkbox.Checkbox
Replace class usage: AlfaCheckBox → Checkbox
Verify setValue/getValue API

rules.context: AlfaCheckBoxGroup maps to Vaadin 24 CheckboxGroup
migrationSteps: Replace import: com.alfa.ui.AlfaCheckBoxGroup → com.vaadin.flow.component.checkbox.CheckboxGroup
Replace class usage: AlfaCheckBoxGroup → CheckboxGroup
Update setItems() and getValue() to return Set

rules.context: AlfaRadioButtonGroup maps to Vaadin 24 RadioButtonGroup
migrationSteps: Replace import: com.alfa.ui.AlfaRadioButtonGroup → com.vaadin.flow.component.radiobutton.RadioButtonGroup
Replace class usage: AlfaRadioButtonGroup → RadioButtonGroup
Update setItems() and getValue()

rules.context: AlfaSlider maps to Input[type=range] or a third-party slider add-on
migrationSteps: Use Input element with type=range, or integrate a slider web component
Set min/max/step via attributes
Handle value change events with addEventListener

rules.context: AlfaOptionGroup (single-select) maps to RadioButtonGroup; multi-select maps to CheckboxGroup
migrationSteps: Determine if single-select or multi-select behavior is needed
Use RadioButtonGroup for single-select, CheckboxGroup for multi-select
Update item rendering and value change listeners

rules.context: AlfaNativeSelect uses native HTML select — use Select or ComboBox
migrationSteps: Replace with Select for simple option lists
Or use ComboBox for searchable selection
Transfer items and value change logic

rules.context: AlfaListBox maps to Vaadin 24 ListBox
migrationSteps: Replace import: com.alfa.ui.AlfaListBox → com.vaadin.flow.component.listbox.ListBox
Replace class usage: AlfaListBox → ListBox
Update setItems() and getValue()

rules.context: AlfaMultiSelect maps to MultiSelectListBox
migrationSteps: Replace import: com.alfa.ui.AlfaMultiSelect → com.vaadin.flow.component.listbox.MultiSelectListBox
Replace class usage: AlfaMultiSelect → MultiSelectListBox
getValue() now returns Set — update callers

rules.context: AlfaTokenField is a tag/token input — maps to MultiSelectComboBox
migrationSteps: Replace import: com.alfa.ui.AlfaTokenField → com.vaadin.flow.component.combobox.MultiSelectComboBox
Replace class usage: AlfaTokenField → MultiSelectComboBox
Update item renderer and value change logic

rules.context: AlfaAutoComplete is an autocomplete text field — maps to ComboBox with lazy loading
migrationSteps: Replace with ComboBox
Implement server-side filtering via setItems(CallbackDataProvider)
Transfer suggestion item rendering

rules.context: AlfaSearchField is a text field with search icon — use TextField with prefix icon
migrationSteps: Replace with TextField
Add search icon via setPrefixComponent(VaadinIcon.SEARCH.create())
Wire search action to ValueChangeListener or Enter key listener

rules.context: AlfaInlineEditor is a click-to-edit widget — build custom with Div + TextField shown on click
migrationSteps: Create a Div showing a label by default
On click, replace label with TextField pre-populated with value
On blur or Enter, save value and restore label display
Apply CSS for seamless inline edit appearance

rules.context: AlfaBigDecimalField maps to Vaadin 24 BigDecimalField
migrationSteps: Replace import: com.alfa.ui.AlfaBigDecimalField → com.vaadin.flow.component.textfield.BigDecimalField
Replace class usage: AlfaBigDecimalField → BigDecimalField

rules.context: AlfaMultiSelectComboBox maps to Vaadin 24 MultiSelectComboBox
migrationSteps: Replace import: com.alfa.ui.AlfaMultiSelectComboBox → com.vaadin.flow.component.combobox.MultiSelectComboBox
Replace class usage: AlfaMultiSelectComboBox → MultiSelectComboBox
getValue() returns Set — update callers

rules.context: AlfaDateField maps to Vaadin 24 DatePicker — value type changes to LocalDate
migrationSteps: Replace import: com.alfa.ui.AlfaDateField → com.vaadin.flow.component.datepicker.DatePicker
Replace class usage: AlfaDateField → DatePicker
Update value type: Date → LocalDate (use .toLocalDate() for conversion)
Update date format via setLocale() or setI18n()

rules.context: AlfaDateTimeField maps to Vaadin 24 DateTimePicker — value type changes to LocalDateTime
migrationSteps: Replace import: com.alfa.ui.AlfaDateTimeField → com.vaadin.flow.component.datetimepicker.DateTimePicker
Replace class usage: AlfaDateTimeField → DateTimePicker
Update value type: Date → LocalDateTime

rules.context: AlfaInlineDateField (always-visible calendar) maps to DatePicker — no always-open mode in Flow
migrationSteps: Replace with DatePicker
Note: DatePicker opens on click only; for always-visible calendar use a third-party add-on
Update value type to LocalDate

rules.context: AlfaTimeField maps to Vaadin 24 TimePicker — value type changes to LocalTime
migrationSteps: Replace import: com.alfa.ui.AlfaTimeField → com.vaadin.flow.component.timepicker.TimePicker
Replace class usage: AlfaTimeField → TimePicker
Update value type: Date → LocalTime

rules.context: AlfaRichTextArea maps to Vaadin 24 RichTextEditor
migrationSteps: Replace import: com.alfa.ui.AlfaRichTextArea → com.vaadin.flow.component.richtexteditor.RichTextEditor
Replace class usage: AlfaRichTextArea → RichTextEditor
Update getValue() — RichTextEditor returns HTML string

rules.context: AlfaPopupDateField maps to DatePicker (popup is the standard behavior in Flow)
migrationSteps: Replace import: com.alfa.ui.AlfaPopupDateField → com.vaadin.flow.component.datepicker.DatePicker
Replace class usage: AlfaPopupDateField → DatePicker
Update value type to LocalDate

rules.context: AlfaDateRangeField has no direct Flow equivalent — use two DatePicker fields
migrationSteps: Replace with two DatePicker fields (start date, end date)
Add validation: end date must not be before start date
Lay out both pickers side by side in HorizontalLayout

rules.context: AlfaMonthCalendar shows a monthly view — DatePicker covers basic case; custom for advanced
migrationSteps: Replace with DatePicker for basic month selection
For full calendar views, evaluate third-party Flow calendar add-ons
Update value type to LocalDate

rules.context: AlfaYearPicker maps to DatePicker with year-only selection via custom I18n or Select
migrationSteps: Use DatePicker with restricted year-only format, or use Select<Integer> for year list
Implement year validation and value change logic
Update downstream code expecting year integer

rules.context: AlfaWeekPicker has no direct Flow equivalent — build week selection with DatePicker + ISO week util
migrationSteps: Use DatePicker to select any day in the week
Compute ISO week number using WeekFields.ISO
Display and validate week number in a separate label or field

rules.context: AlfaTable maps to Vaadin 24 Grid — major API change from Container to DataProvider
migrationSteps: Replace import: com.alfa.ui.AlfaTable → com.vaadin.flow.component.grid.Grid
Replace Container-based data source with DataProvider or setItems(Collection)
Replace addContainerProperty() with addColumn() using lambda/ValueProvider
Migrate cell renderers to ColumnRenderers in Grid
Test sorting, filtering, and pagination behavior

rules.context: AlfaTreeTable maps to Vaadin 24 TreeGrid — hierarchical data structure changes
migrationSteps: Replace with TreeGrid
Replace HierarchicalContainer with TreeDataProvider or HierarchicalDataProvider
Configure expandRecursively and collapse handlers
Test all hierarchy levels

rules.context: AlfaTree maps to TreeGrid (single-column tree display)
migrationSteps: Replace with TreeGrid with a single hierarchy column
Replace HierarchicalContainer with HierarchicalDataProvider
Transfer item caption provider to column ValueProvider
Migrate selection and expand/collapse listeners

rules.context: AlfaGrid is a thin Grid wrapper — maps to Vaadin 24 Grid with minor API updates
migrationSteps: Replace import: com.alfa.ui.AlfaGrid → com.vaadin.flow.component.grid.Grid
Replace class usage: AlfaGrid → Grid
Update DataProvider setup and column definitions

rules.context: AlfaListSelect maps to Vaadin 24 ListBox
migrationSteps: Replace import: com.alfa.ui.AlfaListSelect → com.vaadin.flow.component.listbox.ListBox
Replace class usage: AlfaListSelect → ListBox
Update setItems() and selection listener

rules.context: AlfaTwinColSelect (source/target list) maps to MultiSelectListBox or custom implementation
migrationSteps: Replace with two ListBox components (available / selected) with Add/Remove buttons
Or use MultiSelectListBox for simplified selection
Transfer item rendering and value change logic

rules.context: AlfaTableFieldFactory provides inline editors — use Grid Editor API
migrationSteps: Replace with Grid inline editor using grid.getEditor()
Define editable columns with addEditColumn() or setEditorComponent()
Implement Binder for edited row binding
Configure open/close editor lifecycle

rules.context: AlfaContainer (Vaadin 7 Container pattern) maps to Vaadin 24 DataProvider
migrationSteps: Replace Container with DataProvider<T, F> implementation
Use DataProvider.ofCollection() for in-memory data
Implement AbstractBackEndDataProvider for server-side paging
Update all Container.addItem/addContainerProperty calls

rules.context: AlfaBeanItemContainer maps to ListDataProvider or DataProvider.ofCollection()
migrationSteps: Replace with DataProvider.ofCollection(items) or new ListDataProvider<>(items)
Bind to Grid via setDataProvider()
Remove BeanItemContainer property definitions — use Grid.addColumn() instead

rules.context: AlfaIndexedContainer maps to ListDataProvider for simple in-memory indexed data
migrationSteps: Replace with ListDataProvider backed by a List
Remove indexed access — iterate or use stream operations
Rebind to Grid with setDataProvider()

rules.context: AlfaPagedTable provides pagination — use Grid with lazy loading DataProvider
migrationSteps: Replace with Grid with a back-end DataProvider implementing size/fetch callbacks
Grid handles lazy loading natively — no external paging widget needed
Add optional page size selector if required by UX

rules.context: AlfaLazyLoadingTable maps to Grid with lazy DataProvider
migrationSteps: Replace with Grid configured with a LazyDataView or AbstractBackEndDataProvider
Implement fetch and count callbacks
Transfer sort/filter delegates to DataProvider query handling

rules.context: AlfaEditableGrid maps to Grid with inline editing via Editor API
migrationSteps: Replace with Grid + Editor for inline editing
Implement Binder to bind edited row to domain object
Configure editable columns using column editor components
Add Save/Cancel logic to editor lifecycle

rules.context: AlfaSortableTable maps to Grid — sorting is built-in via column sort order
migrationSteps: Replace with Grid — column sorting is enabled by default
Configure sort direction via column.setSortProperty()
Remove custom sort listener if Grid DataProvider handles sorting

rules.context: AlfaWindow maps to Vaadin 24 Dialog — window management API changes significantly
migrationSteps: Replace import: com.alfa.ui.AlfaWindow → com.vaadin.flow.component.dialog.Dialog
Replace class usage: AlfaWindow → Dialog
Use dialog.open() / dialog.close() instead of UI.getCurrent().addWindow()
Transfer window header and content to dialog header/content slots

rules.context: AlfaSubWindow (modal sub-window) maps to Dialog
migrationSteps: Replace with Dialog
Set modal: dialog.setModal(true) — Dialog is modal by default
Transfer content and close listeners

rules.context: AlfaPopupView maps to Vaadin 24 Popover
migrationSteps: Replace import: com.alfa.ui.AlfaPopupView → com.vaadin.flow.component.popover.Popover
Replace class usage: AlfaPopupView → Popover
Set target component: popover.setTarget(button)
Transfer popup content

rules.context: AlfaNotification maps to Vaadin 24 Notification
migrationSteps: Replace import: com.alfa.ui.AlfaNotification → com.vaadin.flow.component.notification.Notification
Replace class usage: AlfaNotification → Notification
Use Notification.show(text) for simple cases
Configure duration and position

rules.context: AlfaConfirmDialog maps to Vaadin 24 ConfirmDialog
migrationSteps: Replace import: com.alfa.ui.AlfaConfirmDialog → com.vaadin.flow.component.confirmdialog.ConfirmDialog
Replace class usage: AlfaConfirmDialog → ConfirmDialog
Configure header, text, confirm/cancel button text and listeners

rules.context: AlfaErrorDialog is a styled error dialog — build with Dialog + error-themed content
migrationSteps: Replace with Dialog
Add error icon and message to dialog content
Apply error CSS class or Lumo color theme

rules.context: AlfaProgressDialog shows a progress indicator — use Dialog with ProgressBar
migrationSteps: Replace with Dialog containing a ProgressBar
Open dialog on long operation start, close on completion
Update ProgressBar value via UI.access() for thread safety

rules.context: AlfaMessageBox is an alert/message dialog — use Dialog or ConfirmDialog
migrationSteps: Replace with ConfirmDialog for simple OK/Cancel message boxes
Replace with Dialog for custom message layouts
Transfer message text and button click handlers

rules.context: AlfaTooltip maps to Tooltip API or title attribute; Span with tooltip behavior
migrationSteps: Use Tooltip component (Vaadin 24.1+) or Popover for rich tooltips
For simple text tooltips: component.getElement().setAttribute("title", text)
For advanced tooltips: use Tooltip.forComponent(component)

rules.context: AlfaBalloon is a hover balloon — use Popover or Tooltip add-on
migrationSteps: Replace with Popover
Set open trigger to hover: popover.setOpenOnHover(true)
Transfer balloon content and target component

rules.context: AlfaPortlet (Vaadin Portlet integration) has no direct Flow equivalent — manual portlet adaptation required
migrationSteps: Evaluate if portlet container integration is still required
If portlets are still needed, use Vaadin 24 Portlet support (separate add-on)
Otherwise, convert portlet to a standalone Route view

rules.context: AlfaPortletLayout manages portlet layout — no Flow equivalent; convert to AppLayout
migrationSteps: Replace portlet layout with AppLayout or custom VerticalLayout
Migrate portlet slots to named layout regions
Update portlet loading mechanism

rules.context: AlfaPortletWindow renders a portlet in a window — no Flow equivalent; use Dialog
migrationSteps: Convert portlet window functionality to a Dialog
Extract portlet content as a standalone component
Open Dialog containing the component as needed

rules.context: AlfaPortalHeader is a portal-wide header — convert to AppLayout header slot
migrationSteps: Migrate header content to AppLayout.addToNavbar()
Remove portlet-specific lifecycle hooks

rules.context: AlfaDashboard is a portal dashboard — convert to a Route view with card grid layout
migrationSteps: Create a @Route view class extending VerticalLayout or using AppLayout
Replace dashboard widgets with card components in a CSS grid
Transfer widget data sources to service calls

rules.context: AlfaDragAndDropWrapper is a Vaadin 7 DnD container — use DragSource and DropTarget in Flow
migrationSteps: Separate drag and drop concerns: DragSource.create(sourceComponent) for drag
DropTarget.create(targetComponent) for drop
Migrate onDrop handler to DropTarget.addDropListener()
Remove DragAndDropEvent handling — use separate DragStartEvent/DropEvent

rules.context: AlfaDropHandler interface maps to DropTarget listener in Vaadin 24
migrationSteps: Implement DropTarget by calling DropTarget.create(component)
Add drop listener: dropTarget.addDropListener(event -> { ... })
Access transferred data via event.getDragData()

rules.context: AlfaDragSource maps to Vaadin 24 DragSource
migrationSteps: Replace with DragSource.create(component)
Transfer drag data via setDragData()
Add drag start listener if needed

rules.context: AlfaDropTarget maps to Vaadin 24 DropTarget
migrationSteps: Replace with DropTarget.create(component)
Set active state: dropTarget.setActive(true)
Add drop listener

rules.context: AlfaDragEvent maps to DragStartEvent; also see DragEndEvent in Flow DnD API
migrationSteps: Replace AlfaDragEvent listener with DragSource.addDragStartListener()
Access drag data via event.getSource()
Separate start and end event handling

rules.context: AlfaDropEvent maps to Vaadin 24 DropEvent
migrationSteps: Replace AlfaDropEvent handler with DropTarget.addDropListener(DropEvent -> { ... })
Access transferred data via event.getDragData()

rules.context: AlfaSortable is a sortable list via DnD — implement with DragSource + DropTarget on list items
migrationSteps: Make each list item a DragSource
Make each list item a DropTarget to accept reordering drops
Implement reorder logic in DropEvent handler
Update data provider after reorder

rules.context: AlfaLabel maps to Vaadin 24 Span for inline text display
migrationSteps: Replace import: com.alfa.ui.AlfaLabel → com.vaadin.flow.component.html.Span
Replace class usage: AlfaLabel → Span
Transfer text content via setText() or constructor

rules.context: AlfaImage maps to Vaadin 24 Image
migrationSteps: Replace import: com.alfa.ui.AlfaImage → com.vaadin.flow.component.html.Image
Replace class usage: AlfaImage → Image
Set src and alt via constructor or setters

rules.context: AlfaProgressBar maps to Vaadin 24 ProgressBar
migrationSteps: Replace import: com.alfa.ui.AlfaProgressBar → com.vaadin.flow.component.progressbar.ProgressBar
Replace class usage: AlfaProgressBar → ProgressBar
Use setValue(0.0–1.0) for determinate; setIndeterminate(true) for indeterminate

rules.context: AlfaUpload maps to Vaadin 24 Upload with MemoryBuffer or FileBuffer
migrationSteps: Replace import: com.alfa.ui.AlfaUpload → com.vaadin.flow.component.upload.Upload
Replace class usage: AlfaUpload → Upload
Configure MemoryBuffer or MultiFileMemoryBuffer as receiver
Migrate file receive listener to Upload.addSucceededListener()

rules.context: AlfaVideo maps to HTML5 video element via NativeDetails or custom Element
migrationSteps: Create an Element("video") with src, controls, autoplay attributes
Wrap in a Component for type safety
Transfer source URL and configuration

rules.context: AlfaAudio maps to HTML5 audio element via custom Element
migrationSteps: Create an Element("audio") with src and controls
Wrap in a Div or custom Component
Transfer audio source and configuration

rules.context: AlfaFlash embeds Flash content — Flash is EOL; replace with HTML5 equivalent or remove
migrationSteps: Identify what the Flash content provides (video, animation, chart)
Replace video with HTML5 video element
Replace animations with CSS animations or Lottie
Replace charts with a supported chart library

rules.context: AlfaEmbedded embeds external content — use IFrame or custom Element
migrationSteps: Replace with IFrame for embedding external URLs
Set src attribute via setAttribute("src", url)
Ensure CSP/CORS policies allow the embedded resource

rules.context: AlfaCustomComponent is a base class for custom Vaadin 7 components — rewrite as Composite or web component
migrationSteps: Extend Composite<T> for simple wrapper components
Or create a @Tag custom web component for complex components
Transfer all rendering and event handling logic

rules.context: AlfaCustomLayout uses an HTML template for layout — rewrite using Polymer/Lit template or CSS
migrationSteps: Convert HTML template to a LitElement web component or CSS layout
Use Div with named slots if slot-based layout is needed
Transfer named placeholder logic to slot assignments

rules.context: AlfaIcon maps to Vaadin 24 VaadinIcon or custom SvgIcon
migrationSteps: Replace with VaadinIcon.ICON_NAME.create() for Vaadin icon set
For custom icons, use new Icon("iron-icons", "icon-name") or SvgIcon
Map AlfaIcon icon names to equivalent VaadinIcon enum values

rules.context: AlfaHtmlLabel renders raw HTML — use Html component or Span with innerHTML
migrationSteps:
Replace with new Html("
" + content + "
")
Ensure HTML content is sanitized to prevent XSS
Wrap content in a block-level tag (div/p) as Html requires a single root

rules.context: AlfaChart has no built-in Flow equivalent — use a third-party chart add-on (Vaadin Charts, ApexCharts, Chart.js)
migrationSteps: Evaluate Vaadin Charts (commercial) or open-source alternatives like ApexCharts web component
Integrate chosen chart library as a web component
Migrate data series and chart configuration

rules.context: AlfaMap has no built-in Flow equivalent — use Leaflet.js or Google Maps web component
migrationSteps: Evaluate vaadin-map add-on or Leaflet.js integration
Create a web component wrapper for the map library
Migrate map configuration, markers, and event listeners

rules.context: AlfaCodeEditor has no built-in Flow equivalent — integrate CodeMirror or Monaco Editor
migrationSteps: Create a web component wrapper for CodeMirror or Monaco Editor
Expose value get/set as Java methods via @ClientCallable / executeJs
Configure language, theme, and editor options

rules.context: AlfaMarkdown renders Markdown — convert to HTML server-side and render with Html component
migrationSteps: Add a Markdown-to-HTML library (e.g., commonmark-java)
Convert Markdown content to HTML in service layer

Render using new Html("
" + htmlContent + "
")
Sanitize HTML output before rendering

rules.context: AlfaHtmlEditor is a WYSIWYG HTML editor — maps to RichTextEditor
migrationSteps: Replace with RichTextEditor
getValue() returns HTML string — compatible with most use cases
Configure toolbar options if custom toolbar was used

rules.context: AlfaColorPicker has no built-in Flow equivalent — use an Input[type=color] or third-party add-on
migrationSteps: Use Element("input") with type=color for basic browser color picker
Evaluate Vaadin Color Picker add-on or build a custom web component
Handle color value in hex format (#RRGGBB)

rules.context: AlfaFileDownloader triggers file download — use Anchor with StreamResource
migrationSteps: Create StreamResource with file content supplier
Create Anchor with resource: new Anchor(streamResource, "filename")
Set download attribute: anchor.getElement().setAttribute("download", true)
Add anchor to layout (hidden or visible)

rules.context: AlfaExternalResource maps to Anchor for external resource links
migrationSteps: Replace with Anchor(url, caption)
Set target for new tab: anchor.setTarget("_blank")
Transfer rel attribute for security: anchor.getElement().setAttribute("rel", "noopener noreferrer")

rules.context: AlfaBadge maps to Span with badge theme variant in Vaadin 24
migrationSteps: Replace with Span
Apply badge CSS: span.getElement().getThemeList().add("badge")
Transfer badge text and color theme

rules.context: AlfaSpinner is a loading spinner — use ProgressBar with indeterminate mode
migrationSteps: Replace with ProgressBar
Set indeterminate: progressBar.setIndeterminate(true)
Show/hide via setVisible()

rules.context: AlfaAvatarGroup maps to Vaadin 24 AvatarGroup
migrationSteps: Replace import: com.alfa.ui.AlfaAvatarGroup → com.vaadin.flow.component.avatar.AvatarGroup
Replace class usage: AlfaAvatarGroup → AvatarGroup
Configure items via AvatarGroup.AvatarGroupItem

rules.context: AlfaAvatar maps to Vaadin 24 Avatar
migrationSteps: Replace import: com.alfa.ui.AlfaAvatar → com.vaadin.flow.component.avatar.Avatar
Replace class usage: AlfaAvatar → Avatar
Set name and image via setName() and setImage()

rules.context: AlfaDetails (expand/collapse section) maps to Vaadin 24 Details
migrationSteps: Replace import: com.alfa.ui.AlfaDetails → com.vaadin.flow.component.details.Details
Replace class usage: AlfaDetails → Details
Set summary and content via constructor or setters

rules.context: GWT-based styled panel with no Flow equivalent — requires full manual reimplementation
migrationSteps: Document current AlfaStyloPanel behavior and visual appearance
Design replacement using Div with custom CSS or Lumo theming
Implement and test replacement component

rules.context: Custom DTP editor panel with no Flow equivalent — manual investigation required
migrationSteps: Analyze DTPEditorPanel functionality and data model
Evaluate third-party rich text or DTP editor alternatives
Build custom Flow component or integrate web component

rules.context: Color picker dialog with no direct Flow equivalent — use native input[type=color] or third-party
migrationSteps: Evaluate Vaadin Color Picker add-on availability for Vaadin 24
Use Input[type=color] element for basic color selection
For advanced color chooser, implement a custom web component

rules.context: AlfaStepIndicator shows wizard progress — build with Div and CSS step indicator pattern
migrationSteps: Create a HorizontalLayout with numbered step indicators
Apply CSS classes to highlight current step
Update programmatically based on wizard step changes

rules.context: AlfaIconButton maps to Button with icon and ICON theme variant
migrationSteps: Replace with Button(VaadinIcon.ICON.create())
Apply ButtonVariant.LUMO_ICON
Transfer tooltip via getElement().setAttribute("title", label)

rules.context: AlfaActionMenu is a contextual action menu — use MenuBar or ContextMenu
migrationSteps: Replace with MenuBar for top-level action menus
Or use ContextMenu for right-click action menus
Transfer menu items and action listeners

rules.context: AlfaFiltered is a filterable selection field — map to ComboBox with server-side filtering
migrationSteps: Replace with ComboBox with LazyDataView
Implement server-side filter in DataProvider callback
Transfer label and validation rules

rules.context: AlfaRangeSlider is a dual-handle range slider — use a third-party slider web component
migrationSteps: Evaluate available range slider add-ons for Vaadin 24
Or implement using two Input[type=range] with JS overlap prevention
Transfer min/max/step and value change handling

rules.context: AlfaMaskedTextField applies input masking — use TextField with regex/pattern validation
migrationSteps: Replace with TextField
Apply input pattern via setPattern(regex) or addBlurListener with validation
Display mask hint as placeholder

rules.context: AlfaGroupingTable supports row grouping — implement with Grid and custom data grouping
migrationSteps: Replace with Grid
Implement grouping using section headers or TreeGrid for hierarchical grouping
Group data in DataProvider and add separator rows

rules.context: AlfaFilteringTable provides column-level filtering — use Grid with header filter row
migrationSteps: Replace with Grid
Add a filter row above the header using grid.getHeaderRows()
Implement per-column filter text fields wired to DataProvider refresh

rules.context: AlfaFloatingPanel is a draggable floating panel — use Dialog with draggable enabled
migrationSteps: Replace with Dialog
Set draggable: dialog.setDraggable(true)
Set resizable: dialog.setResizable(true) if needed
Transfer panel content

rules.context: AlfaWelcomeScreen is an application welcome overlay — build with Dialog or full-screen Div
migrationSteps: Replace with a Dialog or full-screen Div covering the viewport
Transfer welcome content (logo, message, close button)
Store dismissal state in session or localStorage

rules.context: AlfaDragImage sets a custom drag image — use DragSource with setDragData() and client-side JS
migrationSteps: Use DragSource.create(component)
Set custom drag image via JavaScript: element.addEventListener('dragstart', e => e.dataTransfer.setDragImage(...))
Execute client-side JS via UI.getCurrent().getPage().executeJs(...)

rules.context: AlfaCardLayout is a card container — use VerticalLayout with card CSS classes
migrationSteps: Replace with VerticalLayout
Apply Lumo card CSS classes or custom card styling
Transfer card title, content, and action slots

rules.context: AlfaStatusBar is a status/info bar — use Footer or a fixed-position Div at page bottom
migrationSteps: Replace with Footer or Div with CSS fixed positioning
Transfer status text, progress, and indicator components
Apply Lumo theming for consistent appearance

rules.context: AlfaBreadcrumb is a navigation breadcrumb — build with Nav containing RouterLinks
migrationSteps: Replace with Nav element containing RouterLink components
Separate links with span separators (e.g., ' / ')
Apply aria-label="breadcrumb" for accessibility

rules.context: AlfaPageTitle is a page title component — use H2 or H1 heading element
migrationSteps: Replace with H2 or H1
Set text via constructor
Use @PageTitle annotation for browser tab title

rules.context: Calendar popup window with no direct Flow equivalent — use DatePicker or third-party calendar
migrationSteps: Replace with DatePicker for simple date selection in popup
For full calendar view in a popup, use Dialog containing a third-party calendar web component
Evaluate Vaadin Full Calendar add-on for complex calendar requirements
